title: Effect of Pay-for-Performance in Primary Care on Mortality in the UK
source: U-Michigan CEHR, School of Public Health

L2: Visual abstract on pay-for-performance effects on mortality in UK primary care
Evaluation of financial incentives for healthcare quality
L3: U-Michigan CEHR visual abstract examining the effect of pay-for-performance programs in UK primary care on patient mortality outcomes. Evaluates whether financial incentives for healthcare providers improve patient survival.
